prompt_text: An asterisk is used on "HIIT*", "Kids Klub*", "Personal Training*", and "Racquetball*" without any explanation, leaving the user to guess its meaning (e.g., extra cost, requires booking, not included in membership). This ambiguity undermines the clarity of the service offerings. This is on the asterisk symbol next to specific items in the "Amenities and Services" list. Add a footnote at the bottom of the amenities section or a tooltip/info icon next to the asterisk that explains what it signifies (e.g., "*Requires additional fee" or "*Book in advance"). This provides the necessary context and improves transparency.

prompt_text: The screen forces a decision between “YES” and “No” without offering a way to bypass the step. This creates a hard gate that can frustrate users who want to explore the app first or are unsure how to answer, harming the onboarding experience. Add a “Skip for now” or “Decide later” text option below the “No” button, or include a standard “X” close icon in the top-right corner of the screen to provide a clear exit path.

prompt_text: The club name formats are inconsistent; some parts are in all caps ("MOUNTAIN VIEW"), and others are not, with varying use of hyphens and spacing, which creates a visually fragmented and hard-to-read list. This is on the club name text (the main heading) for each list item. Standardize the club name format. Use title case for the city and street name, and ensure consistent hyphen usage for separators. For example, "MOUNTAIN VIEW (City Sports)" should be "Mountain View (City Sports)", and "SUNNYVALE - E. ARQUES AVE. (City Sports)" should be "Sunnyvale - E. Arques Ave. (City Sports)".

prompt_text: The "LOGIN" button appears enabled (solid teal) even when the Mobile and Password fields are empty. This creates a misleading affordance and doesn't guide the user on the required actions before proceeding. The button should be disabled by default (e.g., light grey or a muted teal color). It should only become enabled after the user has entered valid input in both the Mobile and Password fields.
